title: astragalus angustiflorus subsp. filamentosus
intro: Astragalus angustiflorus subsp. filamentosus, also known as the thread-stemmed milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits of Astragalus angustiflorus subsp. filamentosus include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve overall well-being. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through drying, decocting, or encapsulating its roots and stems, which are then used in traditional medicine to support respiratory and cardiovascular health.
